description_long: This is a large, swept-wing military jet aircraft with a streamlined fuselage and sharply pointed nose. The wings are mounted low on the fuselage and feature a pronounced sweep angle, with no visible winglets. Twin jet engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, with large exhaust nozzles visible from the back. The tail section has a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is deployed, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage. The aircraft is painted in a light gray color with red star insignia on the wings and tail, and the cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage with a smooth, enclosed canopy.
description: A large, swept-wing military jet airplane with twin rear-mounted engines, a pointed nose, and a conventional tail, painted light gray with red star insignia.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, pointed nose, low-mounted swept wings, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, twin rear jet engines, and red star insignia on the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the tail section, engine placement, and landing gear.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the undercarriage, landing gear arrangement, and the clean, streamlined underside of the wings and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept configuration with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a smooth canopy.
